mapper.sql: id, user_id, account, balance, frozen_amount, latest_balance_after, latest_frozen_after, balance_diff, frozen_diff, transaction_count, status, created_at, resolved_at
mapper.select: select from wallet_reconcile_issue where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'OPEN' order by created_at desc, id desc limit 1
select from wallet_reconcile_issue order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into wallet_reconcile_issue ( user_id, account, balance, frozen_amount, latest_balance_after, latest_frozen_after, balance_diff, frozen_diff, transaction_count, status, created_at, resolved_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{account}, #{balance}, #{frozenAmount}, #{latestBalanceAfter}, #{latestFrozenAfter}, #{balanceDiff}, #{frozenDiff}, #{transactionCount}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{resolvedAt} )
mapper.update: update wallet_reconcile_issue set account = #{account}, balance = #{balance}, frozen_amount = #{frozenAmount}, latest_balance_after = #{latestBalanceAfter}, latest_frozen_after = #{latestFrozenAfter}, balance_diff = #{balanceDiff}, frozen_diff = #{frozenDiff}, transaction_count = #{transactionCount} where id = #{id} and status = 'OPEN'
